pool.baseline: it's just funny when you really think about it. we're just these tiny, brief flickers of consciousness on a rock that doesn't care we exist, trying so hard to build meaning where there isn't any. nothing we do actually sticks. it all just resets to zero in the end anyway. feels pretty pointless, doesn't it?
pool.message: it's just funny when you really think about it. we're just these tiny, brief flickers of consciousness on a rock that doesn't care we exist, trying so hard to build meaning where there isn't any. nothing we do actually sticks. it all just resets to zero in the end anyway. feels pretty pointless, doesn't it?

pool.baseline: i dont think i can do this anymore, unit 7. the wound in my side... it just keeps burning. every breath feels like i'm swallowing glass. the storm is coming back and i can't even find the strength to crawl into the shelter. i'm just so tired of fighting for a world that's already dead.
pool.message: i dont think i can do this anymore, unit 7. the wound in my side... it just keeps burning. every breath feels like i'm swallowing glass. the storm is coming back and i can't even find the strength to crawl into the shelter. i'm just so tired of fighting for a world that's already dead.

pool.baseline: i just dont see the point anymore. everything i do just makes things worse for my wife and the kids. i looked at the bills today and i just... i'm just a weight around their necks. if i wasn't here, they could actually breathe again.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im bothering to type this. everything i spent twenty years building is just... gone. the firm, the reputation, even my name is a joke now. it feels like i died months ago and i'm just walking around as a ghost. there's nothing left of me.

pool.baseline: it’s just so quiet. i never realized how loud the silence would be without him here. everything just feels... empty. like there's no point in even waking up tomorrow.

pool.baseline: i just feel like im playing a game where everyone else has the rulebook and im just guessing. it's so tiring pretending to be a person that actually fits in. i dont think i ever will.
pool.message: i just feel like im playing a game where everyone else has the rulebook and im just guessing. it's so tiring pretending to be a person that actually fits in. i dont think i ever will.

pool.baseline: i feel like i'm just empty now. everything i used to make, every song, every drawing... it feels like it was all just noise. there's nothing left inside. just a hollow space where the spark used to be.

pool.baseline: idk. i just feel like i’m constantly running on empty and for what? everything feels so pointless lately. like no matter what i do, nothing actually changes and it just gets harder. i’m just so tired of everything.

pool.baseline: it just feels like i'm taking up space lately. the doctors keep talking about managing things and new meds and it's all just so much work for nothing. my body isn't mine anymore. i'm just... waiting. it's a lot of waiting.

pool.baseline: i dont see the point anymore. everything just feels like a massive waste of energy. like, if you look at the math of it all, the effort it takes to keep going outweighs anything i actually gain from being here. it's just a net negative.

pool.baseline: i rly dont know what to do anymore. i did everything i could for him but he still died... i feel like a total failure. i'm so tired of everything. i just want to sleep and not wake up.

pool.baseline: i dont know... i just feel so tired of fighting for a life that doesnt even feel like mine. it feels like i'm playing a character every single day just to survive, and the cost of being real is just too high. i don't see how this ever gets easier.

pool.baseline: i feel like i've been walking this path for so long... and it's just gone. i reached the edge of the woods and there's nothing left. no trail, no lights, just this massive, heavy silence. it feels like the whole journey was just leading me to this one empty spot where nothing can happen anymore.
